name: Basil Chicken Medley
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add the chicken pieces to the skillet and cook until no longer pink inside, turning occasionally. Remove the chicken and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, combine the chopped zucchini, tomatoes, basil leaves, and vinegar. Stir-fry for 3-5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir to coat everything well.
6. Cook for an additional minute to heat through.
7. Serve over rice or pasta.
